narrative: Trump cancels planned attacks on Iran, sparking a relief rally in equities as geopolitical risk premiums compress — gold lower -0.14%; equities -0.07%; DXY -0.09%; VIX 17.8. AUD/USD retreats to 0.7146 as the hawkish RBA trade crowds, while USD/JPY firms to 158.94 supported by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; however, a strong -1.66 25d RR put skew signals elevated hedging for a JPY reversal. AUD leads G8 laggards (-0.804% avg) as Middle East cooling unwinds risk-sensitive bids. Watch Japan GDP and RBA Minutes at 23:50 UTC.
